title: Dual-Band MIMO Balanced Antenna for C-Band and WLAN Applications
author: Elfergani, I.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Two closely spaced MIMO balanced antennas consist of four printed U-shaped folded arms developed to operate over dualband spectrum of C-band and WLAN. The two-element MIMO antennas are printed over 1.6mm FR4 substrate. The 
present MIMO design occupies a volume of 60 × 23 ×1.6 mm3. The two MIMO balanced antennas are placed over a 
ground plane dimension of 120mmx60mm2. To enhance the isolation between the antenna element, an I-shaped slot is 
generated on the ground plane, which presents a high isolation of around -20dB at both bands. This antenna also 
shows promising performances in terms of envelope correlation coefficient, channel loss, power gain, efficiency 
and current surfaces. This makes the present design a suitable candidate for future MIMO systems
